differentials.name: Cavernous angioma =  collection of sinusoidal spaces
differentials.raw: Cavernous angioma =  collection of sinusoidal spaces

context: √  viscous material in cystic region (protein concentration of 10-30%) √  intrasellar component in 70% √  hemorrhagic mass → methemoglobin √  laminated internal architecture ← thrombus of differing age (best appreciated on T2WI) √  containing thickly mucinous material √  no contrast enhancement √  intra- / suprasellar in location √  with predominantly sebaceous material √  suppressed by fat saturation scan √  round + homogeneous √  suppressed by fat saturation scan √  along floor of 3rd ventricle √  quite small √  multinodular "popcorn" aggregate with central zones of T1 shortening surrounded
